ats: Workday (draftkings.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com) — guest apply, NO account/login required, NO captcha
location: Boston, MA (also posted New York, NY)

key_points.sponsorship_signal: No 'no sponsorship' clause anywhere in JD. NOT asked on Steps 1-2 (may appear on Step 3 Application Questions — answer Sponsorship Required = YES when it does). Gaming-license condition is conditional ('if relevant to your role'), not an ITAR/US-Person wall. DraftKings = gaming/tech, generally sponsors.
